scripts.test: bun test src/ scripts/release-version.test.ts scripts/takosumi-release.test.ts scripts/check-core-release.test.ts && bun scripts/dev-mock-server.ts --self-test
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: bun run build:takos-worker && bun run db:migrate:cloudflare && bunx wrangler deploy
scripts.db:migrate:cloudflare: bunx wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote
scripts.fmt: bunx prettier --write index.html vite.config.ts src site scripts README.md
scripts.fmt:check: bunx prettier --check index.html vite.config.ts src site scripts README.md

ENCRYPTION_KEY.description: Required 64-character hex key used to encrypt sensitive Yurumeet data. Generate one with `openssl rand -hex 32`.

AUTH_PASSWORD_HASH.description: Required password credential for a direct Cloudflare install. Use a PBKDF2 salt:hash value or a strong one-time bootstrap secret.
